title: OGIMA 10 x Metal Iron Flower Pot Vase Hanging Balcony Garden Planter Home Decor
features: The Set of 10 different colors flower pots are made from durable Iron and ideal for the creative gardener.
Mountable Exterior Hanging Balcony Garden Decorations,these Planters will add style and colour to your garden!
Imagine your home cascading with colourful flowers, tasty herbs, peppers, succulent strawberries, salad garden, plump tomatoes and much more.
Can be used with dried flowers, silk flowers, potted plants, and so do small matching decorative pots outside.
Only ordered from "Ogima" flower pots, we will try our best to offer you best quality and service.
description: Product Description OGIMA 10pcs Hanging Flower Pots, Metal Iron Wall Planter Indoor/Outdoor for Railing Fence Balcony Garden Home Decoration with Detachable Hooks Material: Metal Iron, Add a touch of color to exterior walls and fences with these pretty garden ,Balcony, wall planters. Perfect for your deck, patio, front porch, balcony or inside your home making an attractive focal point on your balcony. So ideal if you have a bistro style garden, and perfect for bringing a splash of colors and wow factor to the balcony of your flat when filled with some beautiful plants. Size Caliber: 10CM (3.94 inches); Bottom Diameter: 8CM (3.15 inches) ; Height: 10CM (3.94 inches). Drainage Hole Design Metal Iron Hanging Flower pots, Have Drainage Hole to Keep Soil Drained and Ventilated. With a detachable hook, Very easy to use. Can Be Hung On The Balcony, Window, Railing, Anywhere In the Room, Also For Balcony or inside your home making an attractive focal point. Brand new and high quality These hanging flower pots are made of premium quality metal, strong and durable for indoor and outdoor use. Brightening up your garden if you plant brightly colored flowers,They are the ideal shape and size to create an eye-catching vibrant display of color and also look good hanging from railings or garden fences.
